final:
module top_module(
    input [1:0] A,
    input [1:0] B,
    output reg [1:0] result
);always @(*) begin
        if (A > B) begin
            result = 2'b01;
        end else if (A < B) begin
            result = 2'b10;
        end else begin
            result = 2'b11;
        end
    end

endmodule
